scripts.assets: mkdir -p public/pdfjs && cp -r node_modules/pdfjs-dist/cmaps node_modules/pdfjs-dist/standard_fonts node_modules/pdfjs-dist/wasm node_modules/pdfjs-dist/iccs node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.worker.min.mjs public/pdfjs/
scripts.deploy: bun run build && bunx wrangler pages deploy out --project-name filigrane-local --branch main
